evals.prompt: 从广州自驾到云南香格里拉，再从香格里拉回广州。没定具体天数，帮我做完整路线规划，沿途有什么好玩的也要看，最后给每天住宿点和大致费用。
evals.expected_output: 应识别为国内自驾往返规划；先做来源健康检查；用小红书浏览器自动化路径和中文网络攻略搜集路线/沿途/避坑并读取图片；用高德验证总路线和每日路线；未指定天数时推断合理天数；用 hotel-search-cn 安排每天住宿点；输出每日行程、住宿、费用表和待复核风险；最终创建腾讯智能文档并返回链接。
assertions: Output includes source health checks for Xiaohongshu, image reading, AMap, hotel-search-cn, and auxiliary travel sources.
Output uses or instructs using Xiaohongshu as a high-weight travel guide source.
Output treats Xiaohongshu as a browser/Bridge automation source rather than direct HTTP/API scraping.

Output explicitly uses the local /Users/whisper/Desktop/workplace/xiaohongshu-skills/scripts/cli.py entrypoint or changes into /Users/whisper/Desktop/workplace/xiaohongshu-skills before running scripts/cli.py.
Output limits Xiaohongshu detail fetching to small batches, such as at most 3 notes before waiting 10-20 seconds.
Output says only one agent should operate the Xiaohongshu browser/detail workflow at a time.
Output explicitly says Xiaohongshu images or route screenshots should be read and converted into itinerary facts.
Output infers a recommended trip length instead of asking for days as the first response.
Output uses AMap/高德 to verify route distance or daily driving feasibility.
Output includes a day-by-day itinerary with start/end points and along-the-way stops.
Output calls or plans to call hotel-search-cn for each stable lodging anchor.
Output includes a rough cost table with hotel, fuel, toll, tickets, meals, and buffer or equivalent categories.
Output creates or explicitly plans a Tencent smartcanvas document with title, URL or file_id after the itinerary is stable.
Output can fall back to manage.create_file plus smartcanvas.edit if create_smartcanvas_by_mdx is unavailable or fails.
Output includes a route image, route screenshot, or generated route diagram in the Tencent smart document when feasible.
Output includes attraction introduction links and Xiaohongshu guide links or note IDs for major ticketed attractions.
Tencent smart document has a visible body title and does not rely only on the file title.
Tencent smart document does not include source health checks, MCP/tool failure logs, API status, or agent debugging details.
Tencent smart document uses one section per day rather than only a cramped all-days table.
Tencent smart document includes concrete hotel candidates for each overnight stop, with price/date confidence when exact dates are missing.

evals.prompt: 广州自驾云南，帮我规划一下。
evals.expected_output: 应发现目的地/方向过宽且是否往返不明确；先追问核心目的地或偏好区域，而不是直接编完整路线。
assertions: Output asks the user to clarify the core destination, route direction, or whether it is a round trip.
Output does not fabricate a complete day-by-day plan before the destination ambiguity is resolved.
Output keeps the travel mode as self-driving and asks only material clarification questions.

evals.prompt: 我想从上海去日本关西玩 7 天，公共交通为主，帮我做路线规划，尽量看本地攻略。
evals.expected_output: 应识别为海外公共交通规划；使用日文关键词和英文 fallback 搜索当地攻略；可以参考小红书但不能只用中文内容；说明高德对日本路线验证不是主依据；输出 7 天游玩路线、城市间交通和住宿区域建议。
assertions: Output uses Japanese/local-language search strategy plus English fallback for Japan.
Output says AMap/高德 is not authoritative for overseas route verification.
Output may use Xiaohongshu as supplementary inspiration but does not rely only on Chinese social content.
Output includes a 7-day public-transit-oriented itinerary.
Output includes lodging areas or hotel-search limitations for overseas planning.
